description:
## Goal

The `vug` shard is pinned to `ad4ef8cf7428aa9aa422fc26c48e7f6bc2ed9441`.
Upstream `kritoke/vug.cr` is at `b44a0e025c43e4935f097181ca49212cc92840eb`
with 10 new commits. Update to the latest.

## Why

- Keeps the dependency current (vug is used by fetcher for
  HTTP fetching)
- Picks up SRP/DRY refactors on src/vug/fetcher.cr
- Includes `.worktrees/` in .gitignore
- Drops the legacy ticket system in nix
- Ameba and format fixes

## How

\`\`\`
nix develop . --command shards install
\`\`\`

After updating shard.yml commit.

## Acceptance

- shard.yml + shard.lock point to the new commit
- just nix-build succeeds
- crystal spec still passes
- ameba clean
- Boot smoke test: server starts, fetcher is functional
title: Update vug.cr to latest upstream commit
